	+ x^4*(91390*x^58 + 98800*x^57 + 315380*x^56 + 696560*x^55 + 1343941*x^54 + 2551187*x^53 + 4718845*x^52 + 8493850*x^51 + 14962042*x^50 + 25901237*x^49 + 44145318*x^48 + 74111028*x^47 + 122539152*x^46 - 1452909700*x^45 + 4021129007*x^44 - 10413284882*x^43 + 14024572684*x^42 - 19522625915*x^41 + 14959956112*x^40 - 13369059110*x^39 + 4686439828*x^38 - 3385146737*x^37 - 504089396*x^36 - 445529774*x^35 - 371850479*x^34 + 45633213*x^33 + 342061486*x^32 + 822840520*x^31 + 1458720426*x^30 + 2272092842*x^29 + 3190161306*x^28 + 4026799646*x^27 + 4417738301*x^26 + 3738605248*x^25 + 3403887906*x^24 - 1225190750*x^23 + 5682703*x^22 - 7630925795*x^21 - 3352922962*x^20 - 9095996373*x^19 - 3853292050*x^18 - 5593668191*x^17 - 2070258954*x^16 - 1917210411*x^15 - 546305874*x^14 - 336822980*x^13 - 55522688*x^12 - 21749728*x^11 + 485056*x^10 + 308308*x^9 + 186780*x^8 + 106920*x^7 + 57168*x^6 + 28104*x^5 + 12424*x^4 + 4780*x^3 + 1520*x^2 + 364*x + 52)*y^8

	+ x^15*(780*x^43 + 1960*x^42 + 4335*x^41 + 8962*x^40 + 17205*x^39 + 31048*x^38 + 53411*x^37 + 88466*x^36 + 141953*x^35 + 221496*x^34 + 336919*x^33 + 500562*x^32 + 727597*x^31 - 35251908*x^30 + 68442283*x^29 - 159727204*x^28 + 160866547*x^27 - 189550296*x^26 + 104431105*x^25 - 78416155*x^24 + 20571504*x^23 - 11057553*x^22 + 4315788*x^21 + 4347608*x^20 + 7770271*x^19 + 10030537*x^18 + 12423524*x^17 + 14503750*x^16 + 15922688*x^15 + 16043254*x^14 + 14007825*x^13 + 8705310*x^12 - 1261779*x^11 - 17610256*x^10 - 22651375*x^9 - 51588644*x^8 - 30735639*x^7 - 55539415*x^6 - 21261683*x^5 - 29575956*x^4 - 7639916*x^3 - 7658378*x^2 - 1092728*x - 749398)*y^6
	- x^15*(40*x^41 + 130*x^40 + 299*x^39 + 597*x^38 + 1095*x^37 + 1885*x^36 + 3080*x^35 + 4814*x^34 + 7242*x^33 + 10540*x^32 + 14905*x^31 + 20555*x^30 + 27729*x^29 - 4150419*x^28 + 6762880*x^27 - 14422600*x^26 + 12109158*x^25 - 12665151*x^24 + 5604934*x^23 - 3634135*x^22 + 920674*x^21 - 148868*x^20 + 447095*x^19 + 483483*x^18 + 585855*x^17 + 634584*x^16 + 648047*x^15 + 607450*x^14 + 490477*x^13 + 271290*x^12 - 79471*x^11 - 594688*x^10 - 1310765*x^9 - 2267628*x^8 - 2155450*x^7 - 3435151*x^6 - 1696536*x^5 - 2474710*x^4 - 692026*x^3 - 826010*x^2 - 115050*x - 101270)*y^5
	+ x^15*(x^39 + 4*x^38 + 10*x^37 + 20*x^36 + 35*x^35 + 56*x^34 + 84*x^33 + 120*x^32 + 165*x^31 + 220*x^30 + 286*x^29 + 364*x^28 + 455*x^27 - 394450*x^26 + 527360*x^25 - 1001472*x^24 + 664088*x^23 - 600127*x^22 + 195104*x^21 - 103229*x^20 + 28093*x^19 + 9684*x^18 + 18968*x^17 + 18209*x^16 + 15871*x^15 + 11563*x^14 + 4894*x^13 - 4527*x^12 - 17091*x^11 - 33189*x^10 - 53212*x^9 - 77551*x^8 - 106597*x^7 - 140741*x^6 - 107224*x^5 - 143959*x^4 - 51830*x^3 - 66220*x^2 - 10000*x - 10660)*y^4
	+ x^15*(29260*x^24 - 30324*x^23 + 50046*x^22 - 23358*x^21 + 17909*x^20 - 3214*x^19 + 1482*x^18 - 200*x^17 - 65*x^16 + 116*x^15 + 343*x^14 + 616*x^13 + 935*x^12 + 1300*x^11 + 1711*x^10 + 2168*x^9 + 2671*x^8 + 3220*x^7 + 3815*x^6 + 4456*x^5 + 5143*x^4 + 2950*x^3 + 3575*x^2 + 701*x + 820)*y^3
	- x^15*(1596*x^22 - 1140*x^21 + 1593*x^20 - 379*x^19 + 264*x^18 + 17*x^17 + 23*x^16 + 29*x^15 + 35*x^14 + 41*x^13 + 47*x^12 + 53*x^11 + 59*x^10 + 65*x^9 + 71*x^8 + 77*x^7 + 83*x^6 + 89*x^5 + 95*x^4 + 101*x^3 + 107*x^2 + 36*x + 41)*y^2
	+ x^15*(57*x^20 - 21*x^19 + 24*x^18 + x^17 + x^16 + x^15 + x^14 + x^13 + x^12 + x^11 + x^10 + x^9 + x^8 + x^7 + x^6 + x^5 + x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + x + 1)*y
	- x^33;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
